title: QSP
description: Quantum Signal Processing algorithm for cos(t * x) evolution. Constructs polynomial transformations using optimized phase sequences.

params.help: Target evolution parameter τ for the cos(t * x) evolution.
params.name: t

params.help: Polynomial degree for QSP approximation. Higher degree gives better accuracy but more gates.
params.name: d

params.help: Test eigenvalue x for accuracy verification (must be in [-1, 1]).
params.name: x
params.info: 请输入浮点数，如 0.1，范围在-1到1之间
